name: d3-flame-graph
when_to_use: 需要把性能剖析的层级耗时 JSON 渲成可下钻、缩放和搜索高亮的火焰图时用它而非手写 SVG,因为原生手写在层级宽度归一、深度布局和局部缩放上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认做不到按累计耗时精确分配帧宽、保持父子层级并提供本地下钻;Markdown/mermaid 对火焰图也为零能力,d3-flame-graph 补齐完整交互布局。

data_in._why_no_example: 层级 JSON 是 AI 原生记法,字段与递归约束钉死后 schema 足矣,不附 minimal example。

root.name: string
root.value: number —— 有限且 >= 0;默认 selfValue:false 时父节点值应包含全部子节点权重

spec.note: SVG 图宽从容器量取,boot 显式设 height 400px与 cellHeight 18px;只使用像素数值,铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高。

en.when_to_use: Use it to render hierarchical profiling-time JSON as a flame graph with drill-down, zoom, and search highlighting instead of hand-written SVG, which tends to fail at hierarchical width normalization, depth layout, and local zoom.
en.why_valuable: AI cannot reliably allocate frame widths from cumulative time, preserve parent-child hierarchy, and provide local drill-down. Markdown/mermaid also have no flame-graph capability; d3-flame-graph supplies the complete interactive layout.

root.name: string
root.value: number -- finite and >= 0; with the default selfValue:false, a parent's value should include the weights of all its children

spec.note: SVG width is measured from the container; boot explicitly sets height to 400px and cellHeight to 18px. Use pixel values only; rule 3 forbids vh or percentage heights.

carriers.widget: supported:主题 CSS 放入 shadowRoot,SVG 与交互 DOM 全落 shadow 容器;本 boot 未启用可选外置 tooltip
carriers.codex: supported:两个 ESM CDN 入口 + 同源 CSS + SVG,无上行依赖

isolation.evidence: dist/d3-flamegraph.es.js: getName=d.data.n||d.data.name (L255), getValue=d.value||d.data.v||d.data.value (L209/257), children via internal d3.hierarchy — so schema root{name,value,children} is correct. default export=flamegraph factory; boot's flamegraph().width().height().cellHeight() + select(el).datum(root).call(chart) matches README. Chart-internal tooltip2=null (L237) and is used only `if(tooltip2)` (L521/L680); boot never calls .tooltip(), so the body-appending defaultFlamegraphTooltip (L88 `select('body').append('div')`) stays inactive — no body mutation. Theme CSS is external dist/d3-flamegraph.css (file confirmed present) which the widget boot puts into shadowRoot; library injects nothing to head and adds no window resize. SVG renders into the provided container → shadow-safe.
